description: Consolidate vector storage around LanceDB, migrate Qdrant workflows where remote-service semantics are not required, demote FAISS/Qdrant to optional extras, remove unjustified sqlite-utils, and evaluate DuckDB VSS as an experimental analytics adjunct.
oracle_notes: LanceDB-first consolidation is repo-side complete: sqlite-utils is removed from default dependencies, FAISS is optional-only, Qdrant/FAISS remain lazily import-compatible from the storage package root, generic Qdrant lifecycle coverage is replaced by LanceDB lifecycle tests, and Qdrant remains only as an optional concrete module with import/client branch tests. Full hosted CI remains a post-push check.
